atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports intermittent toe pain, redness, and stiffness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a significant exacerbation last week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes a throbbing pain occasionally.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes a sharp, stabbing pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty with the sheets at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient walks on his heel to avoid bending the toe.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has tried ibuprofen with limited relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no prior stomach problems.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's big toe exhibits a large spur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's big toe exhibits significant cartilage loss.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has palpable bone spurs on the dorsal aspect of the great toe joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tenderness to palpation on the dorsal and lateral aspects of the great toe joint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain and stiffness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has hallux rigidus with significant cartilage loss and a large spur.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has significant inflammation and discomfort.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes meloxicam 15mg daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to continue with ibuprofen as needed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician counsels the patient on maintaining activity levels.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician advises the patient to avoid excessive walking or prolonged standing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules return precautions for worsening symptoms or lack of improvement.
